sql_array: CREATE TABLE connections (id INT PRIMARY KEY, client_name VARCHAR(255), status VARCHAR(50));
INSERT INTO connections (id, client_name, status) VALUES (1, 'ClientA', 'active');
INSERT INTO connections (id, client_name, status) VALUES (2, 'ClientB', 'inactive');
INSERT INTO connections (id, client_name, status) VALUES (3, 'ClientC', NULL);
SELECT * FROM connections WHERE id != (SELECT id FROM connections WHERE client_name = 'ClientB');
SELECT * FROM connections AS c1 WHERE c1.status != (SELECT status FROM connections AS c2 WHERE c2.id = c1.id AND c2.client_name IS NOT NULL);
SELECT connection_id() AS conn_id FROM connections WHERE id != 1 AND status IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id FROM connections WHERE connection_id() != (SELECT connection_id() FROM connections WHERE client_name = 'ClientA');
SELECT connection_id(), COUNT(*) FROM connections GROUP BY connection_id() HAVING COUNT(*) != 1;
SELECT c1.client_name FROM connections c1 JOIN connections c2 ON c1.id != c2.id WHERE c1.status IS NULL;
SELECT connection_id() FROM connections ORDER BY id != (SELECT MIN(id) FROM connections);
CREATE TABLE edge_cases (edge_id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, edge_value NUMERIC, edge_type VARCHAR(50));
SELECT edge_value FROM edge_cases WHERE edge_id != (SELECT edge_id FROM edge_cases WHERE edge_value IS NULL OR edge_value = 0);
SELECT edge_type FROM edge_cases WHERE edge_value NOT IN (SELECT edge_value FROM edge_cases WHERE edge_type = 'undefined') AND edge_id != 1;
SELECT SUM(edge_value) FROM edge_cases GROUP BY edge_type HAVING SUM(edge_value) != (SELECT SUM(edge_value) FROM edge_cases WHERE edge_value IS NOT NULL);
SELECT connection_id() FROM connections WHERE connection_id() != (SELECT connection_id() FROM connections WHERE status IS NOT NULL AND id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM connections));
